status: height: 50px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 0 28px 0 24px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text-primary);
np-body: flex: 1; overflow: hidden; display: flex; flex-direction: column; padding: 0 24px;
np-top: display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 4px 0 18px;
np-ctx-label: font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 1.2px; color: var(--text-secondary); text-transform: uppercase;
flow-badge: position: absolute; top: 16px; left: 16px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 7px; background: rgba(15,13,19,0.55); backdrop-filter: blur(8px); padding: 7px 13px 7px 11px; border-radius: 999px;
eqbars: position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 46%; display: flex; align-items: flex-end; gap: 4px; padding: 0 18px 22px;
np-titlerow: display: flex; align-items: flex-start; justify-content: space-between;
scrub-track: height: 4px; border-radius: 2px; background: var(--surface-2); position: relative;
scrub-fill: position: absolute; left: 0; top: 0; height: 100%; width: 42%; border-radius: 2px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--flow-1), var(--flow-2));
scrub-knob: position: absolute; left: 42%; top: 50%; width: 13px; height: 13px; border-radius: 50%; background: #FFF; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); box-shadow: 0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
scrub-time: display: flex; justify-content: space-between; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; color: var(--text-secondary); margin-top: 9px; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
tp-play: width: 68px; height: 68px; border-radius: 50%; background: linear-gradient(135deg, var(--flow-1), var(--flow-2)); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; box-shadow: 0 12px 28px -8px rgba(255,0,146,0.6);
tab: display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; color: var(--text-tertiary); font-size: 10px; font-weight: 600; gap: 4px; letter-spacing: 0.1px;
